title: SEIF Event
description: Append-only, hash-chained event. The event log is the source of continuity; graph, memory, and read-models are DERIVED projections that may never rewrite it. Delivery is at-least-once; effects must be idempotent (see receipt.schema.json). Do not promise exactly-once.

type.description: task.created | task.transition | artifact.produced | approval.requested | approval.granted | approval.denied | claim.asserted | claim.superseded | receipt.written | contradiction.opened

prev_hash.description: sha256 of the prior event in the chain

hash.description: sha256 over the canonicalized event excluding 'signature'

signature.description: v0.1: optional sha256 attestation. ML-DSA-65 -> NOT_IN_V0_1.
